summary: Implemented the Cashu-L402 integration layer. cashuL402Middleware accepts 'Authorization: Cashu <token>' headers, validates token format/mint trust/value offline, then redeems against the mint (atomic double-spend prevention). TokenRegistry provides a local TTL-based replay guard. loadConfig() reads CASHU_MINT_URL and REQUIRED_SATS env vars. src/index.ts now exposes a working /api/data protected route. 20 new tests added (58 total, all passing). TypeScript compiles clean.
suggestion: All 6 tasks are now complete. Next I would add a Redis-backed TokenRegistry for production use, and add HTTP endpoint documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger) for the payment challenge and protected routes.
